creator: Kate Park
title: (No AI) AI boom pushes Samsung to $1T
dc:creator: Kate Park
content: Samsung crossed the $1 trillion valuation mark after shares surged on AI-driven chip demand, making it only the second Asian company after TSMC to hit the milestone.
contentSnippet: Samsung crossed the $1 trillion valuation mark after shares surged on AI-driven chip demand, making it only the second Asian company after TSMC to hit the milestone.

title: (No AI) Google’s AI search summaries will now quote Reddit
author: Jess Weatherbed
content:
![A screenshot of first-hand source links being added to Google’s AI Search results.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Google-AI-Search-updates-Reddit-linking.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Want real human feedback related to your search results? Google’s AI now fetches it for you. | Image by Google / The Verge

Google is updating its AI Search features to make it easier for users to find information from sources they know and trust. One of the more notable changes introduces "a preview of perspectives" from firsthand sources like social media, Reddit, and other web forums, effectively linking your search queries with online conversations around similar topics.

Google says this update aims to address that "people are increasingly seeking out advice from others" when searching for information online. This will be relatable for anyone who's added "Reddit" to the end of Google Search terms to find experiences from real humans instead of SEO-optimized …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/924993/google-ai-search-mode-overviews-update-reddit-links)

Google says this update aims to address that "people are increasingly seeking out advice from others" when searching for information online. This will be relatable for anyone who's added "Reddit" to the end of Google Search terms to find experiences from real humans instead of SEO-optimized  …

title: (No AI) Microsoft’s Office and LinkedIn chief now runs Teams in latest reshuffle
author: Tom Warren
content:
![Vector illustration of the Microsoft logo.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/25832915/STK095_MICROSOFT_2_CVirginia_D.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Microsoft's LinkedIn chief, Ryan Roslansky, took on an [expanded role](https://www.theverge.com/microsoft/679753/microsoft-linkedin-chief-office-ai-reorg) at the company as head of Office last year, and he's now getting more responsibilities as part of the latest leadership reshuffle inside Microsoft. Sources tell me that the Microsoft Teams organization is moving to report to Roslansky, who will now lead a new Work Experiences Group at Microsoft.

The changes, which come a week after Roslansky named a [new CEO of LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/ryanroslansky_last-year-when-satya-nadella-asked-me-to-share-7452746333465255937-S11s/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAAAmZBMB4ZPLFVeakJlucqgeZbv9Gl1WRKU), are part of a broader reshuffle triggered by Rajesh Jha, executive vice president of Microsoft's experiences and devices group, [retiring from Microsoft](https://www.theverge.com/news/893755/microsoft-rajesh-jha-retirement-head-of-experiences-and-devices-shakeup) after more than 35 years. Jha was responsible for the …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/924931/microsoft-office-copilot-windows-reorg-shuffle)
contentSnippet:
Microsoft's LinkedIn chief, Ryan Roslansky, took on an expanded role at the company as head of Office last year, and he's now getting more responsibilities as part of the latest leadership reshuffle inside Microsoft. Sources tell me that the Microsoft Teams organization is moving to report to Roslansky, who will now lead a new Work Experiences Group at Microsoft.
The changes, which come a week after Roslansky named a new CEO of LinkedIn, are part of a broader reshuffle triggered by Rajesh Jha, executive vice president of Microsoft's experiences and devices group, retiring from Microsoft after more than 35 years. Jha was responsible for the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Unlocking large scale AI training networks with MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection)
content: OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
contentSnippet: OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.

creator: Alana Hope Levinson
title: (No AI) Hasan Piker, Self-Described ‘Ayatollah of Woke,’ Wants AI to Die
dc:creator: Alana Hope Levinson
content: The far-left Twitch streamer says AI is rotting our brains. He’s also addicted to Twitter and listens to at least eight podcasts.
contentSnippet: The far-left Twitch streamer says AI is rotting our brains. He’s also addicted to Twitter and listens to at least eight podcasts.
